_meta.description: Topic-level bilingual explanations for NJ driver quiz answers. Each entry covers multiple related questions.

adult_bac.zh: NJ 成年司机（21 岁及以上）的 BAC 限值是 0.08%；达到或超过即构成酒驾（DUI）。
adult_bac.en: For NJ drivers 21 and older, the BAC limit is 0.08%. At or above this is DUI.

under21_bac.zh: NJ 对未满 21 岁司机零容忍：BAC 0.01% 或以上（任何可检测的酒精量）即违法。
under21_bac.en: NJ has zero-tolerance for under-21 drivers: BAC ≥ 0.01% (any detectable amount) is a violation.

alcohol_equivalent.zh: 一杯标准饮品的酒精含量大致相等：12 盎司啤酒 ≈ 5 盎司葡萄酒（12%）≈ 1.5 盎司 86 度烈酒。换算时按这条记。
alcohol_equivalent.en: Standard drink equivalents: 12 oz beer ≈ 5 oz wine (12%) ≈ 1.5 oz 86-proof liquor. Remember this conversion.

dui_first_offense.zh: 首次酒驾（现行法规，2019/12/01 后）：BAC 0.08–0.10% 罚款 $250–$400；BAC ≥ 0.10% 罚款 $300–$500。安装点火互锁装置（IID），装好后才能恢复驾照（不再是固定吊销 3 月-1 年）。3 年附加费 $1,000/年。
dui_first_offense.en: First DUI (current law, post-12/1/19): BAC 0.08–0.10% → $250–$400 fine; BAC ≥ 0.10% → $300–$500. Ignition Interlock Device required; license suspended until IID installed (no longer fixed 3-mo to 1-yr). $1,000/year surcharge for 3 years.

dui_second_offense.zh: 第二次酒驾（10 年内）：罚款 $500–$1,000、监禁可达 90 天、吊销驾照 1-2 年（现行法规）。社区服务 30 天。
dui_second_offense.en: Second DUI (within 10 years): $500–$1,000 fine, up to 90 days jail, 1-2 year license loss (current law). 30 days community service.

dui_third_offense.zh: 第三次酒驾（10 年内）：罚款 $1,000、监禁可达 180 天、吊销驾照 8 年（现行法规，从原 10 年改为 8 年）。
dui_third_offense.en: Third DUI (within 10 years): $1,000 fine, up to 180 days jail, 8-year license loss (current law; reduced from previous 10 years).

dui_refusal.zh: 拒绝化学测试（呼气测试）的初犯处罚与 BAC ≥ 0.10% 的酒驾相同，外加 3 年 $1,000/年的保险附加费。
dui_refusal.en: Refusing chemical (breath) test on first offense carries the same penalties as DUI with BAC ≥ 0.10%, plus $1,000/year surcharge for 3 years.

park_fire_hydrant.zh: 离消防栓 10 英尺（约 3 米）内不可停车。
park_fire_hydrant.en: No parking within 10 feet (≈3 m) of a fire hydrant.

park_crosswalk.zh: 离十字路口的人行横道 25 英尺（约 7.6 米）内不可停车。
park_crosswalk.en: No parking within 25 feet (≈7.6 m) of a crosswalk at an intersection.

park_stop_sign.zh: 离停车标志（STOP 标志）50 英尺（约 15 米）内不可停车。
park_stop_sign.en: No parking within 50 feet (≈15 m) of a stop sign.

park_fire_station.zh: 消防站车道同侧 20 英尺、对侧 75 英尺范围内不可停车。
park_fire_station.en: No parking within 20 feet of a fire station driveway on the same side, or 75 feet on the opposite side.

park_railroad.zh: 离铁路平交道 50 英尺（约 15 米）内不可停车。
park_railroad.en: No parking within 50 feet (≈15 m) of a railroad crossing.

speed_points.zh: NJ 超速扣分档：超速 1-14 mph 扣 2 分；15-29 mph 扣 4 分；30+ mph 扣 5 分。
speed_points.en: NJ speeding points: 1-14 mph over = 2 points; 15-29 mph over = 4 points; 30+ mph over = 5 points.

speed_limits.zh: NJ 默认限速：学校/商业/居民区 25 mph；郊区 35 mph；非张贴乡村道路 50 mph；州/州际公路 55 mph；部分州际 65 mph。
speed_limits.en: NJ default speed limits: school/business/residential 25 mph; suburban 35 mph; non-posted rural 50 mph; state highway/interstate 55 mph; some interstates 65 mph.

tailgating_points.zh: 紧贴跟车（tailgating）被定罪扣 5 分。

reckless_racing_points.zh: 鲁莽驾驶（reckless driving）和公路上赛车（racing）各扣 5 分。
reckless_racing_points.en: Reckless driving and racing on a highway each = 5 points.

improper_passing_points.zh: 不当超车（improper passing）扣 4 分。

slow_speed_points.zh: 因低速阻碍交通扣 2 分；单行道上逆行扣 2 分；未在人行横道停让行人扣 2 分。
slow_speed_points.en: Slow speed blocking traffic = 2 points; wrong way on one-way = 2 points; failure to stop at crosswalk = 2 points.

stopping_distance.zh: 干燥路面总制动距离（思考距离 + 刹车距离）的近似值：30 mph ≈ 88 ft；40 mph ≈ 149 ft；50 mph ≈ 243 ft。雨雪天距离会大幅增加。
stopping_distance.en: Approximate total stopping distance (thinking + braking) on dry road: 30 mph ≈ 88 ft; 40 mph ≈ 149 ft; 50 mph ≈ 243 ft. Distances grow sharply in rain/snow.
stopping_distance.source_label: NJ Driver Manual / third-party prep references

gdl_age_summary.zh: NJ GDL 年龄：特别学员准证 16 岁；考试准证 / 实习驾照 17 岁；基本驾照（GDL 路径）18 岁；成人路径基本驾照 21 岁。
gdl_age_summary.en: NJ GDL ages: Special Learner Permit at 16; Examination Permit / Probationary at 17; Basic Driver License (GDL path) at 18; Basic License (Adult path) at 21.

gdl_decal.zh: 21 岁以下的学员/实习驾照持有人必须在前后车牌左上角各贴一张红色反光小牌（一对 $4），提示其他司机。
gdl_decal.en: Under-21 permit/probationary drivers must display a red reflective decal on the top-left of both front and rear plates ($4/pair).

gdl_practice.zh: 特别学员准证和考试准证都需要至少 6 个月的有监督驾驶练习。监督人需持 NJ 驾照、至少 3 年驾龄、21 岁以上。
gdl_practice.en: Both Special Learner and Examination Permits require at least 6 months of supervised practice. Supervisor must hold NJ license, have ≥3 years driving experience, and be 21+.

address_change.zh: 地址变更必须在 1 周（7 天）内向 MVC 报告。
address_change.en: Address change must be reported to MVC within 1 week (7 days).

name_change.zh: 姓名变更必须在 2 周内向 MVC 报告。
name_change.en: Name change must be reported to MVC within 2 weeks.

inspection_after_move.zh: 从外州搬到 NJ 后，必须在车辆登记后 14 天内完成验车。
inspection_after_move.en: After moving to NJ from out-of-state, vehicle inspection must be completed within 14 days of registration.

inspection_freq.zh: NJ 燃油/柴油载客车辆每 2 年验车一次。新车前 5 年免检。商用车每年验车一次。
inspection_freq.en: NJ gas/diesel passenger vehicles: inspection every 2 years. New cars exempt for first 5 years. Commercial vehicles: yearly.

uninsured.zh: 无保险驾车：首次罚款 $300–$1,000、吊销驾照 1 年、3 年附加费 $250/年。第二次罚款最高 $5,000、吊销驾照 2 年、监禁 14 天。
uninsured.en: Driving uninsured: 1st offense $300-$1,000 fine, 1-year license suspension, $250/year surcharge for 3 years. 2nd offense up to $5,000 fine, 2-year suspension, 14 days jail.

skid_recovery.zh: 车辆打滑时：松开油门和刹车，将方向盘转向打滑（车尾甩出）的方向。绝不能猛踩刹车或反向打方向。ABS 车辆可保持稳定刹车；非 ABS 应轻点刹车。
skid_recovery.en: If your car skids: ease off gas and brake, steer in the direction the rear of the car is skidding. Never slam brakes or steer opposite. With ABS, maintain steady braking; without ABS, pump gently.

blowout_action.zh: 爆胎时：紧握方向盘保持直行，不要急刹车，松油门让车自然减速，再缓慢驶向路肩停车。
blowout_action.en: Tire blowout: grip the wheel firmly and keep going straight; do not slam the brakes. Ease off the gas to slow gradually, then steer carefully onto the shoulder.

hill_parking_wheels.zh: 坡道停车（无路沿时）：车轮一律朝路边方向。下坡有路沿时车轮朝路沿；上坡有路沿时车轮反向（远离路沿）。
hill_parking_wheels.en: Parking on hill (no curb): turn wheels toward the road edge. Downhill with curb: toward the curb. Uphill with curb: away from the curb.

emergency_vehicle.zh: 见到亮警灯/鸣笛的警车、消防车、救护车时：立即让行，靠右停车直到通过。
emergency_vehicle.en: When emergency vehicles with lights/sirens approach: yield immediately, pull right and stop until they pass.

school_bus_stopped.zh: 见到亮红灯停下的校车（任何方向）：必须停车至少 25 英尺远，等所有红灯停止后才能继续。
school_bus_stopped.en: When school bus stops with red lights flashing (from either direction): stop at least 25 feet away and wait until red lights stop.

flashing_red_signal.zh: 闪烁红灯：完全停车，让行后方可通过（同 STOP 标志）。闪烁黄灯：减速通过，注意路况。
flashing_red_signal.en: Flashing red: come to a full stop, yield, then proceed (same as STOP sign). Flashing yellow: slow down and proceed with caution.

right_on_red.zh: 红灯右转：除非有 "No turn on red" 标志，完全停车并确认安全后允许右转。
right_on_red.en: Right turn on red: allowed unless a "No turn on red" sign is posted. Come to a full stop and confirm safe before turning.

right_of_way_intersection.zh: 无信号路口、两车同时到达：右侧车辆优先。所有方向都停（4-way stop）：先到的先走；同时到的右侧优先。
right_of_way_intersection.en: Uncontrolled intersection, two cars arrive together: the car on the right has right-of-way. At 4-way stop: first arrived goes first; if tied, right has priority.

follow_distance.zh: 正常天气保持 2 秒车距（前车经过某点后数 2 秒）。雨雪、能见度差时增加到 3-4 秒。
follow_distance.en: Normal weather: maintain 2-second following distance (count 2 seconds after the lead car passes a point). Rain/snow/poor visibility: increase to 3-4 seconds.

headlight_use.zh: 近光灯（low beam）：双向道路对向有车、城市道路、雨雾天必须使用。远光灯（high beam）：空旷夜间道路，但接近对向车 500 ft 内必须切回近光。
headlight_use.en: Low beam: required when oncoming traffic on two-way road, urban driving, rain/fog. High beam: open dark road; switch back to low within 500 ft of oncoming car.

seat_belt_law.zh: NJ 全员安全带法：所有前排乘员（不论年龄）必须系安全带；18 岁以下后排乘客也必须系。8 岁以下且不足 80 磅儿童必须坐儿童安全座椅。
seat_belt_law.en: NJ universal seat belt law: all front-seat occupants must buckle up; rear passengers under 18 must as well. Children under 8 and under 80 lbs require a child safety seat.

hand_signals.zh: 手势信号（用于转向灯失灵）：左转：左臂平伸；右转：左臂向上弯成 "L"；停车/减速：左臂向下弯成倒 "L"。
hand_signals.en: Hand signals (when turn signals fail): Left turn: left arm straight out. Right turn: left arm bent up like 'L'. Stop/slow: left arm bent down like inverted 'L'.

curve_driving.zh: 进入弯道前减速，过弯时保持稳定速度，出弯后再加速。
curve_driving.en: Slow down BEFORE entering the curve; maintain steady speed through it; accelerate after exiting.

sign_shapes.zh: 标志形状速记：八边形 = STOP；三角形（尖端朝下）= YIELD 让行；菱形 = 警告（黄底黑字）；矩形（竖）= 法规（白底）；矩形（横）= 导向/服务（绿/蓝底）；五边形 = 学校区。
sign_shapes.en: Sign shapes: Octagon = STOP. Triangle (inverted) = YIELD. Diamond = warning (yellow). Vertical rectangle = regulatory (white). Horizontal rectangle = guide/service (green/blue). Pentagon = school zone.

sign_colors.zh: 标志颜色速记：红 = 禁令/停车；黄 = 警告；橙 = 施工区；绿 = 导向/允许行为；蓝 = 服务设施；棕 = 公园/休闲；白 = 法规。
sign_colors.en: Sign colors: Red = prohibition/stop. Yellow = warning. Orange = construction zone. Green = directions/permitted. Blue = services. Brown = parks/recreation. White = regulatory.
